provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human woman in a form-fitting glossy spandex bodysuit in bright red and gold with a cape and a mask, striking a power pose with hands on hips and legs wide apart, a stylized emblem on the chest, high-heeled armored boots, the outfit is skintight and impractical for any real work, this is a superhero costume not clothing anyone would wear on a ship
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy, superhero

judgment.explanation: Glossy red and gold spandex bodysuit with cape, mask, power pose, stylized emblem. Superhero costume not clothing. Wrong genre entirely.
